title: Stock Market for Beginners in 2026 | Share Market Basics Explained by Vaibhav Kadnar | Hindi
description:
Share Market Basics Explained by Vaibhav Kadnar in Hindi | Stock Market for Beginners 

You might have heard that the market crashed, XYZ company stock prices went up or down, that ABC company listed their IPO in the share market etc. We all know Harshad Mehta who became a millionaire overnight using the stock market. So what is this stock market and how does it work? 

Today we learn how the share market works, how the market goes up and down and how we can track this stock market. Different strategies of stock trading like day trading (also known as intraday trading), positional trading, options trading etc. We are going to simplify the stock market for you so that you have a clear understanding before you go and invest your hard earned money in it.

The topics covered in this video are:

1) What is a share? Understand what exactly a share is and a share price is with examples. How is a share being an ownership of the company, how does funding, valuation of a company, company expansion, public participation etc matter is the share market.

2) What is the share market? Understand how you can execute buy and sell orders of shares and how these transactions take place between you and a company. What are stock exchanges and what is Bombay stock exchange, National stock exchange, stockbrokers etc.

3) What is the Share Market Index? Understand how crashes or booms happen in the market, how it affects the share market and the investors, how demand and supply works in the share market, different sectors of the market etc.

4) What are different types of Stock trading? Understand how you can trade in the stock market like intraday trading or day trading, positional trading, swing trading etc. Long term investments vs short term investments, technical expertise needed for stock trading, what's market analysis etc.

I hope you are now clear what exactly is the stock market and how it works. I will be making this a series where I will be teaching you from the basics of the stock market to advanced things you need to know to enter the financial market and start your investments.

#stockmarket #stockmarketindia #stockmarketforbeginners #vaibhavkadnar
